title: LOW: /admin/webauthn/register accessible without auth
description: In src/webauthn.rs lines 213-351 and 521, GET /admin/webauthn/register serves a full HTML registration page to any unauthenticated visitor. While the actual registration flow (POST /admin/webauthn/register/begin) correctly requires admin password, the page itself reveals: (1) that this is a smallhold instance, (2) whether passkeys are already registered (line 215-218). This leaks operational information to unauthenticated scanners. Consider either requiring auth on the GET page or making it generic.
close_reason: Fixed: register_page no longer reveals whether passkeys are registered. Message is now generic.
